Venue Info
Media Gallery
Georgia Theatre
Athens, GA
Seating Capacity: 600
Venue Type : Auditorium

Total Gigs: 9
  DMB  (9)

Longest Performance:
02.05.94 - Seek Up (15:02)
Venue Picture
Description
A fire severely damaged the Georgia Theatre in 2009, but it was rebuilt and reopened in 2011 with a new seating capacity of 1000.
